title: BBAI Stock Climbs As Defense AI Contracts Fuel Momentum
text: BBAI stock climbed as defense AI contracts fuel momentum. BigBear.ai secured approximately $75 million in new contract wins across national security and trade & travel sectors during Q1 2026, with more than $60 million categorized as national security contracts. The company's story is shifting from can they win deals to how fast can they scale those deals. In Q1, BigBear.ai narrowed its EPS loss to -$0.12 from -$0.25 a year ago, a meaningful improvement. Management called out about $75M in new wins tied to national security and trade & travel programs, and the company has been selected for a long-term U.S. Air Force contract vehicle worth up to $900 million.
